Localization.Description: Remote execution of the Sliver GetSystem command from the C2 framework Sliver is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to remotely obtain system privileges using the {subject.process.name} (Sliver implant) executable on host {event_src.host} is detected
System privileges from host {src.host} were remotely obtained using the {subject.process.name} (Sliver implant) executable on host {event_src.host}
